responsibilities: Documenting project structure and module organization under src/
Listing build, test, and development commands with Node.js requirements
Specifying coding style, naming conventions, and linting rules
Providing testing guidelines for Vitest and schema compliance
Outlining commit and pull request conventions (Conventional Commits)
Giving documentation maintenance instructions for English and Chinese
Embedding ArchSpine-specific instructions for AI agents and human contributors
outOfScope: End-user documentation for ArchSpine tool usage
Detailed API reference for every module
External contribution processes beyond the repository

English.purpose: This document exists to onboard developers and AI agents to the ArchSpine repository by explaining its directory layout, development workflow, coding conventions, and the ArchSpine context layer that governs AI interactions. It ensures consistency in contributions and helps maintainers enforce quality standards.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience includes software developers, maintainers, and AI agents (such as Claude or Copilot) who need to understand how to navigate, build, test, and contribute to the ArchSpine codebase. The document is a living reference that should be consulted before making changes.
key_takeaways: Source code is organized under src/ with cli, core, engines, services, infra, assets/templates, and ast/rules as key directories.
Node.js 20+ is required; use npm install, npm run build, npm test for standard workflows.
Strict TypeScript with ES modules, 2-space indentation, camelCase/PascalCase conventions are enforced via ESLint and Prettier.
Tests are run with Vitest; schema compliance and protocol validation are separate test suites.
Commits follow Conventional Commits format (e.g., fix:, feat:). PRs must include verification steps and links to issues.
Public docs have English and Chinese mirrors; docs/zh-CN/ must stay aligned.

ArchSpine context (in .spine/) is a control plane: .spine/atlas/ and .spine/view/pages/ provide semantic summaries, while .spine/index/ holds structured data. AI agents should prefer MCP server and never manually edit generated outputs.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档旨在为开发者和AI代理介绍ArchSpine仓库的目录结构、开发工作流、编码规范以及控制AI交互的ArchSpine上下文层，从而帮助新成员快速上手并保证贡献的一致性，同时支持维护者执行质量标准。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 目标读者包括软件开发者、维护者以及需要理解如何浏览、构建、测试和贡献ArchSpine代码库的AI代理（如Claude或Copilot）。本文档是一份活的参考，在进行任何改动前应当查阅。
key_takeaways: 源代码组织在src/下，关键目录包括cli、core、engines、services、infra、assets/templates和ast/rules。
需要Node.js 20+；使用npm install、npm run build、npm test执行标准工作流。
强制使用严格TypeScript、ES模块、2空格缩进、camelCase/PascalCase命名约定，并通过ESLint和Prettier执行。
测试使用Vitest运行；还提供了schema合规性和协议验证的独立测试套件。
提交遵循Conventional Commits格式（例如fix:、feat:）。PR必须包含验证步骤和相关issue链接。
公共文档配有英文和中文镜像；docs/zh-CN/必须保持同步。
ArchSpine上下文（位于.spine/）是控制面：.spine/atlas/和.spine/view/pages/提供语义摘要，而.spine/index/包含结构化数据。AI代理应优先使用MCP服务器，且绝不手动编辑生成的输出。
